properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: No mountain high, no valley low No river wide enough to stop You How great is Your love for me The darkest night, the deepest sea No power on earth could ever stop You How great is Your love for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I'm falling in Your waves of love It's too wonderful for me In Your presence, God, my fear's undone I surrender all of me!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No weight of sin, no sting of death No power in hell could ever stop You You conquered it all for me You conquered it all for me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We sing with the heavens Ohhhh How great is your love
